task_intents: setting a timer for focused writing
reviewing memory retention or spaced repetition
analyzing complex problems under a deadline
example_tasks: Block 2 hours for deep work on research paper
Study machine learning algorithms for 1 hour
Schedule strategic planning session for Q3
Solve complex algorithm challenges before noon
reasoning: The icon combines a brain and a clock, clearly representing concepts like deep work, focused study, cognitive processing time, or scheduled mental tasks. This is highly useful for distinguishing high-focus intellectual tasks from routine administrative chores.
